timeframes.vpa_sensors: bar TF of frame — look=3, vol_sma=14, stop_look=5

entry_checklist: Primary long gates pass (POC/VA + specialist routing)
Prefer demand_node (near VAL/POC) with vpa_score + mom >= 0
Avoid chase at VAH with hot macd + big ret_5d
Soft cut if high_beta and QQQ RS weak
exit_fast: armed + mom <= -1.10 and score <= -0.60 and underwater
mid-trade size *0.85 when mom <= -0.70 and score < 0
after_trade: eng.record_trade(pnl, symbol=...) so next plan inherits streak
options_live_note: GEX/call-put walls stay desk confluence (poc_va_gex); scale size, do not flip side
